channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Lesson 11: “My meaningless thoughts are showing me a meaningless world.”
item.description: “My meaningless thoughts are showing me a meaningless world.” This is the first idea we have had which is related to a major phase of the correction process; the reversal of the thinking of the world. It seems as if the world determines what you perceive. Today’s idea introduces the concept that you
